n: The Spectre and the Shadow, Part 5

steps.t: Join Khaljûn at Khamósh-engar. Khamósh-engar can be found just outside of Sormedân on the hill.
Gather stones for Khaljûn suitable to making a stele in remembrance of his brother.
Give Khaljûn space for his thoughts at Khamósh-engar.
Help Khaljûn craft the finished stone to honour Mashâr.
